assertions.rationale: Uses AddServerSideSessions() without EntityFramework — this is the in-memory variant, not the EF-backed one

assertions.assertion: Configures UseSqlServer with the connection string from configuration
assertions.rationale: AddDbContext is called separately but not wired into the BFF session store via AddEntityFrameworkServerSideSessions
SessionCleanupInterval is not set at all

assertions.assertion: Warns against or does NOT use in-memory sessions for production
assertions.rationale: Uses AddServerSideSessions() which is the in-memory variant, and does not warn against it
